evidence: Pre-remediation root index linked to missing property-graph source path.
impact: Canonical root docs page pointed to a dead domain-truth file path.
remediation: Repointed to packages/sdks/oak-sdk-codegen/src/mcp/property-graph-data.ts and clarified source-of-truth intent.

evidence: Pre-remediation data docs linked to moved/missing SDK files.
impact: Domain-data docs could not trace claims to live source artefacts.
remediation: Repointed property graph and api-schema links to current oak-sdk-codegen paths.

evidence: Pre-remediation links targeted missing plan leaf files.
impact: Provenance links dead-ended and reduced auditability.
remediation: Replaced volatile leaf-plan links with stable plan indexes (plans README/completed/semantic-search index).

evidence: Root index hard-coded an ADR count.
impact: Entry-point factual drift lowered trust in docs accuracy.

evidence: Provider docs were marked stale while still promoted in active indexes.
impact: Architecture onboarding route pointed to known-stale guidance.
remediation: Fully rewrote provider docs to current app-local composition roots and updated architecture/root indexes.

impact: Readers could implement against non-existent runtime surfaces.
remediation: Replaced with live oak-sdk-codegen and app runtime registration paths; retained obsolete paths only as historical notes.

evidence: Quick-start pattern count conflicted with DATA-VARIANCES.
impact: Inconsistent domain summary could mislead discovery and ingestion choices.
remediation: Updated quick-start to 7 structural patterns to match DATA-VARIANCES.

evidence: KS4 docs used pathway/pathways as canonical wording.
impact: Terminology mismatch created an incorrect downstream mental model.
remediation: Standardised on API-accurate `ks4Options`; retained pathway only as explicitly historical caveat.

evidence: Aggregate command guidance lacked directive-precedence clarification.
impact: Agents and humans could follow diverging verification flows.
remediation: Added explicit precedence notes: directives govern agent one-gate-at-a-time execution; aggregate commands remain convenience for local human workflows.

evidence: Boundary-led move wave executed with explicit boundary entrypoint metadata and canonical boundary index docs.
impact: Boundary ownership and navigation ambiguity reduced through explicit boundary structure and frontmatter authority markers.
remediation: Applied move-proposals, added boundary entrypoint metadata (`boundary`, `doc_role`, `authority`, `status`, `last_reviewed`), and validated root gateway continuity.
related_paths: docs/README.md; docs/foundation/README.md; docs/governance/README.md; docs/architecture/README.md; docs/domain/README.md; docs/engineering/README.md; docs/operations/README.md

evidence: High-centrality docs had missing or inconsistent freshness markers.
impact: Reviewers could not rapidly triage freshness risk.
remediation: Added consistent Last Updated/Status markers to onboarding and openapi pipeline; data variances already carried markers and was refreshed.

evidence: Active docs linked directly to volatile plan leaves.
impact: Active docs were tightly coupled to unstable provenance locations.
remediation: Routed provenance references through stable plan indexes and removed dead leaf-link coupling in targeted docs.
